name: midos-memory-cascade
description: 5-tier self-tuning memory system for AI agents. Tiered routing from cache to vector search, with automatic shortcut learning.

competitors.author: NextFrontierBuilds
competitors.weakness: 6 manual layers, no self-tune, requires OpenAI key

competitors.author: byteroverinc
competitors.weakness: CLI-only, external npm dep, sends data to LLM provider

competitors.author: halthelobster
competitors.weakness: Memory is a side feature, not the core. Manual SESSION-STATE.md

unique_features: 5-tier automatic routing (T0 cache → T1 JSON → T2 SQLite → T3 LanceDB → T4 Grep)
Self-tuning via usage feedback (evolve learns query→tier shortcuts)
No external dependencies or API keys required for core tiers
Feedback hook tracks every memory access for optimization
Cascade fallback ensures answers even when higher tiers miss
